name: Cheese - The Cheese Collector
short_description: Cheese - The Cheese Collector is a grindy clicker game. Compete against friends or the globe to have the most cheese. Unlock upgrades, choose a theme that fits you, View a user's profile and statistics.
detailed_description:
Cheese - The Cheese Collector

This Is a simple down to earth clicker game...


a grindy clicker game. Compete against friends or the globe to have the most cheese. Unlock upgrades, choose a theme that fits you, View a user's profile and statistics.

Note: Most of the features listed below will be added in later updates.

Features:

• Leaderboard to see who has the most amount of cheese

• Community and Non Community Created Cheeses to be put in-game

• Achievements

• An In game shop where you can use your click currency to buy items to advance your gameplay

• Funny Easter eggs and secrets that happen as you progress through the game with more being added over time.
